title: EngineLesson
description: Single annotated learning unit for shared-engine corpus (Engine School). Schema contract v1.x.

schemaVersion.description: Must match x-alchemist-schema-version in lesson.schema.json; bump both when evolving the contract.

id.description: Unique lesson identifier, e.g. engine_school_role_model_v1 or engine_school_lesson_002

presetName.description: Human-readable preset name used when teaching name→mapping→character

style.description: Style category (taxonomy or DL staging label — not committed as binaries)

mappings.description: Abstract parameter emphasis (≥1 key); not raw .fxp offsets

priorityMappingKeys.description: Top 2–3 mapping keys that most define this archetype (must be keys of mappings when present)

contrastWith.description: Explicit contrast to another committed lesson (recommended)

lessonId.description: id of another lesson in corpus

difference.description: Why this archetype differs (decision-grade, not a second full essay)
